title: senecio auriculatus
intro: Senecio auriculatus, also known as woolly groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and skin conditions, and is believed to have antioxidant, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Woolly groundsel can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory problems, soothe skin irritations, and support liver health.
